title: Be able to link directly to an automation recipe from a URL

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Both Zapier & make have the ability to link directly to a particular automation from their websites:

Screenshot 2025-05-14 at 23.37.511826×1676 317 KB

Screenshot 2025-05-14 at 23.38.371826×1676 308 KB

This is really powerful as it brings value immediately.

If the install link for a app – https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=4df83d629019fae349d48059fa698d49&response_type=install – had another parameter for the automation recipe, it could have a wizard which does the following steps:

  • install the app (if not already installed)
  • select a board
  • display the exact correct automation recipe

This would allow users to be sent a link to a recipe sentence and have the exact correct recipe appear in their browser.

It would also do wonders for both usability and SEO as app vendors could list all their automations on their own websites and link directly to them.

This would also save a lot of time with customer support as you could just send a link to the automation and it would open on their own system/account.

Please steal the good ideas from Zapier and make.com..
